votes.reason: The Python code correctly checks if the given integer equals the length of the string, matching the Coq specification.

The Python code correctly checks if res equals the length of string s using len(), which matches Coq's String.length. Both return the same concrete result for any string input.

The Python function checks whether res equals the length of the string s, which matches the Coq spec that res = String.length s. Both compute string length and compare it to res for any concrete input.
